title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext AI model predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance warning days before the Category 5 storm's Jamaica landfall. The system enabled meteorologists and authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings and protect vulnerable communities.
